rationale: Decomposes AR pipeline latency with full napkin math per stage. Create+quantify fits realization; apply-level depth matches L3.
Sizes OTA bandwidth across two platforms with delta-compression comparison. Quantitative realization at apply level.
Sizes registry storage per tier/version with cost realization. Straightforward multi-factor quantification fits realization@L3.
Concrete full memory layout (OS, weights, KV, scratch) plus TPOT computation — classic create+quantify realization.
Comparative 3-platform analysis with per-platform OS, KV, TPOT, and concurrency trade-off. Analyze+create depth is L4, not apply.
Sizes bandwidth per-component for full mobile stack with napkin math. Realization@L3 defensible.
Sizes peak/avg bandwidth during decode including weight + KV traffic. Apply-level quantitative realization.
Sizes cross-platform storage + CDN cost with delta-update savings. Quantitative realization at apply level.
Sizes peak/sustained bandwidth over multi-turn conversation with KV growth. Realization with apply-level computation.
Compares dynamic vs static quantization trade-offs and recommends — analyze+create without primary sizing. Fits evaluation@L4.
Explains utilization gap (8% NPU) and proposes fixes — root-cause analysis. Diagnosis@L4 fits better than realization@L3.
Computes energy-per-inference across three execution units with napkin math. Quantify+create fits realization@L3.
Designs QoS-aware scheduling strategy under thermal throttling with calculated budgets. Design@L4 better than realization@L3.
Sizes KV cache and assesses memory pressure on specific device — concrete quantitative realization at apply level.
Diagnoses NaN loss in mixed-precision training with gradient-overflow root cause and fixes. Pure diagnosis, not sizing/realization.
Identifies why MSA and FFN hit different utilization ceilings and proposes distinct fixes. Diagnosis@L4 over realization.
Designs hybrid Core ML + PyTorch Mobile architecture to replicate gradient-based adaptation. Creative design@L4.
Specifies dataset format, quantization pipeline, splits with storage sizes. Concrete build-out fits realization@L3.
Sizes dataset fit in PSRAM vs SRAM with training-loop design. Realization with quantification at apply level.
Sizes and validates weights, activations, latency vs SRAM budget. Canonical realization@L3.
Multi-model Flash/SRAM layout with shared arena reasoning and layer-by-layer Flash fallback. Design complexity pushes to L4.
Sizes complete SRAM/PSRAM/Flash layout for ESP32-S3 voice assistant. Concrete multi-tier realization at apply level.
Roofline feasibility check with Flash, SRAM, latency sizing — core quantitative realization@L3.
Sizes attention memory footprint then proposes local attention alternative. Realization with quantification.
Quantifies SRAM vs PSRAM throughput and latency — definition-plus-compute pattern. Fluency@L3 fits better than realization.
Designs ring-buffer batching strategy with memory and scheduling calculations. Design intent with sizing = design@L3.
Designs duty-cycling strategy to hit 7-day target with quantitative trade-offs. Design@L4 fits better than realization@L3.
Entropy calc + Huffman compression ratio + decompression overhead sizing. Quantitative realization at apply level.
Computes junction temp from thermal-resistance formula with plug-in values. Definition+quantify pattern fits fluency@L3.
Sizes average power across two-stage detector with battery-life realization. Apply-level multi-mode quantification.
Evaluates INT4 feasibility, rejects it with reasoning, proposes INT8 pruned alternative. Evaluation with trade-off analysis = L4.
Applies thermal-resistance formula to ambient+power; determines no throttling. Plug-in quantification, fluency@L3.
Sizes MAC throughput vs deadline, determines infeasibility, proposes concrete reduction. Quantitative realization at apply level.
Designs RTOS inference-integration strategy with priority, memory placement, DMA. Design@L3 better fits than realization.
Designs tiered keep-warm strategy (CPU pre-load, predictive scaling) with cost/latency calcs. Design@L4 over realization.
Sizes Chinchilla-optimal token budget, raw data, DataLoader throughput for cluster — comprehensive realization at analyze level.
Per-component latency breakdown for 70B serving request with AllReduce accounting. Realization@L4.
Designs lifecycle-tiered storage strategy with S3 Glacier transition and cost deltas. Design@L4 fits over realization.
Sizes all memory components for LLaVA-13B on H100 plus max-batch computation. Canonical realization@L4.
Per-GPU ZeRO-2 memory budget with weights, grads, optimizer, activations sized. Defensible realization@L4.
Sizes per-stage memory for 8-stage PP of 70B; identifies ZeRO-2 need. Multi-factor realization@L4.
Computes per-stage activation memory with vs without checkpointing. Quantitative realization@L4.
Fleet-size design under SLO burst, batching trade-offs, pre-warm policy — evaluative design with napkin math spans L5.
Sizes KV pool, computes max concurrency with INT4 weights. Quantitative realization@L4 fits.
Determines compute vs memory regime and selects queueing model (M/M/1 vs M/D/1). Analyze-first, minimal sizing — analyze@L4.
Sizes systolic array mem/compute for attention layer with tile counts. Full quantitative realization@L4.
Compares row vs column vs tiled layouts via BW calculations and justifies XLA default. Evaluation@L4 over realization.
Allocates $500K budget across training/inference/storage with concrete H100 counts. Sizing-driven realization@L4.
Sizes fleet count and annual cost from throughput demand; revenue reconciliation. Quantitative realization@L4.
Applies 6ND formula plus layer-by-layer FLOP counting for BERT. Formula-plus-computation pattern is fluency, not realization.
Full peak-activation sizing for GPT-3 with and without checkpointing; TP requirement derivation. Realization@L4.
Computes AI, compares to ridge point, determines compute-bound and efficiency gap. Analyze@L4, not build-out realization.
Evaluates per-tensor vs per-channel vs SmoothQuant trade-off with HW-efficiency reasoning. Evaluation@L4.
Sizes per-token HBM traffic and derives decode throughput. Quantitative realization@L4 fits.
Compares static vs continuous batching throughput with efficiency calculation. Evaluation@L4 over realization.
Sizes full rack power budget including switches, CPUs, DRAM, NICs. Comprehensive realization@L4.
Ring-AllReduce time formula applied to 13B gradient; comm-vs-backward overlap analysis. Realization@L4 defensible.
Sizes KV per-token, fragmentation impact, batch-size gain from paging. Quantitative realization@L4.
Quantifies frequency-throughput relationship and recovery time from thermal perturbation. Analyze@L4 fits better.
Sizes per-layer TP communication (AllGather+AllReduce) and efficiency vs linear scaling. Realization@L4 defensible.
Computes AI for encoder vs decoder, places on roofline, derives ceilings. Primary skill is analyze, not build-out.
Analyzes SM occupancy mismatch (24% SMs, 1.5% occupancy) and identifies under-utilization. Analyze@L4 over realization.
Sizes carbon per 1M tokens for FP16 vs INT8 with full PUE/grid conversion and annual delta. Realization@L4.
Designs soft-start stagger policy for PDU inrush; calculates steady-state and peak headroom. Design@L4 fits better.
Designs adapter versioning/rollback system end-to-end with per-stage latency. Design@L4 over realization.
Designs parallel/delta/hierarchical index-build strategies to hit 30-min SLA. Design@L4 fits better.
Designs hot-row replication + update-coalescing strategy with consistency via all-reduce. Design@L4.
Diagnoses memory-bound QPS ceiling via roofline, proposes fusion, quantifies new AI and throughput. Optimization@L4.
Explains why QAT uses more memory than FP32 baseline and proposes fix. Root-cause + remedy is diagnosis@L4.
Explains how Hailo DFC handles SRAM overflow via spatial tiling; quantifies trade-off. Analyze@L4 over realization.
Designs Coral-to-Orin handoff protocol and applies M/D/1 sizing to prevent backlog. Design@L4.
End-to-end data-pipeline sizing across weeks with upload, dedup, labeling, training. Full realization@L4.
Sizes tiered checkpoint storage with NVMe writes, cloud sync, retention for 200-device fleet. Realization@L4.
Designs in-process watchdog with rolling-window percentile detection. Design@L4 with size validation.
Quantifies two fusion savings sources (launch overhead + BW); decomposes impact. Analyze@L4 over realization.
Analyzes AI per op type to show fusion is ineffective at batch=4; compute-bound conclusion. Analyze@L4.
Sizes input queue in bytes with M/D/1 computation and SRAM fit-check. Realization@L4 defensible.
Per-stage G/D/1 sizing, total P99 derivation, bottleneck identification. Realization@L4 fits.
Determines compute vs memory-bound regime and picks queueing model accordingly. Analyze@L4.
Compares INT8 vs FP16 across FPS/mem/latency and cross-platform (Coral vs Hailo). Evaluation@L4.
Analyzes batch-vs-throughput crossover on roofline; shows batch=1 already compute-bound. Analyze@L4 fits.
Concrete 1yr TCO breakdown: HW, power, maintenance, connectivity with % attribution. Realization@L4.
Compares scale-up vs scale-out 3yr TCO with availability/SLA/failure analysis. Evaluation@L4.
Sizes solar system then compares 5yr TCO to grid; concludes solar $831 premium. Evaluation@L4 over realization.
Computes unit economics: gross/net margin, break-even volume, volume-pricing sensitivity. Realization@L4.
Sizes Phi-3 memory + decode latency, verifies 2s SLO, selects INT4+INT8 KV. Realization@L4 defensible.
Computes exact FLOPs/token, compares to 2N, derives memory-bound regime. Analyze-led, not build-out. Analyze@L4.
Realizes output-stationary tiling with SRAM fit-check, tile count, SRAM traffic. Canonical realization@L4.
Sizes W4A8 memory fit, dequant overhead, throughput for Hailo-8. Realization@L4 defensible.
Designs thermal solution for sealed enclosure after showing 15W infeasible at 5W mode. Design@L4 over realization.
Diagnoses ONNX export failure due to missing symbolic registration; proposes forward-only registration. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses 4.5x budget overshoot to BPTT serialization in control loop. Root-cause attribution is diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses torch.compile slowdown on small model via kernel-launch overhead reasoning. Diagnosis@L4.
Diagnoses DRAM-bound bottleneck via roofline, proposes layer-fusion/depth-first tiling, quantifies. Optimization@L4.
Designs sequential-load CoreML orchestration with explicit unload and memory budget. Design@L4.
Designs state-persistence + truncated-prefill resume path to hit 500ms SLO. Design@L4 with sizing.
Designs hybrid on-device/cloud routing + PII scrub + context sanitization with energy comparison. Design@L4.
Sizes LoRA fine-tuning memory, compute, data volume in background time budget. Realization@L4.
Designs cross-device dataset-consistency mechanism (SHA256, versioned schemas) with participation estimates. Design@L4.
Designs two-state (inference vs training) checkpoint architecture with retention and atomic update. Design@L4.
Analyzes weight-vs-activation BW ratio to conclude fusion is ineffective on decode batch=1. Analyze@L4.
Realizes KV cache layout with concrete tensor shapes, addresses, sizes for GQA-8 3B model. Realization@L4.
Realizes system-prompt KV prefix cache with TTFT improvement quantification and RoPE consistency. Realization@L4.
Compares on-device vs cloud 2yr TCO ($60 vs $10.95M); concludes on-device wins. Evaluation@L4.
Sizes RAM footprint, load times, storage cost with LRU paging realities. Realization@L4.
Full memory layout for Llama-3-1B with 7B draft-model headroom calculation. Realization@L4.
Sizes Llama 3.2 1B deployment on A17 Pro: KV, TTFT, decode, power budget. Realization@L4.
Analyzes UMA bandwidth contention across CPU/GPU/NE with tok/s under contention scenarios. Analyze@L4 over realization.
Designs adapter-quantization strategy for HW limitation with fallback alternatives. Design@L4.
Designs lightweight on-device RLHF pipeline: reward mapping, DPO-lite, privacy. Design@L4 with sizing.
Sizes unit economics: margins, warranty sensitivity, volume scaling. Quantitative realization@L4.
Compares 1K/10K/100K volume BOM scaling and margins across three volumes. Evaluation@L4 over realization.
Sizes first-year platform dev cost and NRE amortization per unit. Realization@L4 defensible.
Designs 3-phase QAT pipeline with GPU-hour budget and accuracy targets. Design@L4.
Implements circular KV buffer with pointer logic, memory, bandwidth — algorithm realization@L4.
Evaluates binary vs ternary trade-offs on M4: speedup vs accuracy. Evaluation@L4 fits over realization.
Designs M7/Ethos-U55 layer-routing strategy based on op support and speedup. Design@L4.
Designs SRAM tiling strategy with weight-resident + spatial tiles. Design@L4.
Designs 4-state power FSM with battery-target-driven duty-cycle derivation. Design@L4.
Applies Little's Law formula: L=λW → λ=L/W. Definition-plus-plug-in fits recall@L3 (borderline fluency).
Computes PUE = total/IT and interprets. Formula+definition, recall@L3 acceptable.
Applies ring-AllReduce formula 2(N-1)/N·D/B with FP32 vs BF16 sizing. Formula+quantify is fluency.
Explains RDMA Write vs Send semantics and use case. Primarily definition-based recall with light quantify.
Computes Flash Attention IO complexity with formula and plug-in values. Formula+quantify = fluency@L3.
Describes K8s NetworkPolicy + CNI semantics with light quantification. Recall@L3 defensible.
Explains MoE vs dense memory/compute trade-off with memory calc. Definition-centric recall@L3.
Explains QoS conflict and proposes 2-class scheduling. Definition-first with quantify. Recall@L3 acceptable.
Computes activation per micro-batch × 8 in-flight for max micro-batch. Quantitative answer = fluency@L3.
Tiered freshness SLA with example enforcement pattern. Conceptual recall with light sizing. Recall@L3 fits.
Applies WUE×Power×Hours formula to get 2.16M L/day. Formula+definition=fluency@L3.
Derives attention AI, compares to H100 ridge point; numeric calculation dominates. Fluency@L3.
Quantifies intermediate HBM traffic eliminated (21.5GB, 6.4ms). Formula+quantify = fluency@L3.
Explains that MoE FLOPs scale with active not total params; simple FLOP calc. Definition-centric recall@L3.
Describes MoE router architecture and placement via Mixtral example. Pure architectural recall.
Describes hipify-perl limits and required manual audits (textures, cooperative groups, intrinsics). Recall with light quantify.
Describes ONNX opset compatibility error and three remediation paths. Definition-based recall@L3.
Explains NCHW/NHWC layout portability issue with transpose-size quantification. Recall@L3 defensible.
Explains gradient bucketing and overlap mechanism; light quantify. Recall@L3 fits.
Describes double-buffering mechanism with util calc. Conceptual recall + simple quantify.
Explains DMA copy engine independence enabling compute/H2D/D2H overlap. Architectural recall@L3.
Derives ring-AllReduce time complexity 2(N-1)/N·M/B and applies to 8 H100s. Derivation+quantify = fluency@L3.
Explains ECMP hash polarization vs oversubscription with pigeonhole argument. Concept-heavy recall@L3.
Computes 12.2M packets/sec and 82ns decision budget; constrains algorithm. Derive-plus-quantify = fluency@L3.
States and applies ring-AllReduce time formula 2(N-1)D/(NB) with 64-GPU numeric case. Fluency@L3.
Walks through recursive halving-doubling steps with alpha/beta latency model for 8 GPUs. Fluency@L3.
Describes IB HCA, SM, QP, virtual lanes architecture. Textbook architectural recall@L3.
Computes Send/Recv vs Write overhead at 65K messages; shows polling overhead dominates. Fluency@L3.
Enumerates RoCE v2 headers, sums bytes, computes payload efficiency vs native IB. Formula+quantify=fluency@L3.
Describes column-parallel + row-parallel fusion eliminating intermediate AllReduce. Architectural recall@L3.
Describes pre-sharded vs mmap checkpoint loading with size comparison. Architectural recall@L3.
